stem: A software testing study surveys 100 test cases and observes 24 positive outcomes out of 100 (24.0%). Estimate the true software bug rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.24. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1669, 0.3323]. Point estimate: 0.2496.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
